broadcast_player_death_hostile_1: Attention. The Necromancer who was colluding with the Resistance and causing a disturbance has just been suppressed.
broadcast_player_death_hostile_2: Associating with the living rebels has finally turned them into a corpse. Though I expect they will crawl back out soon enough.
broadcast_player_death_normal_1: Attention. The Necromancer has ceased activities.
broadcast_player_death_normal_2: They will likely regenerate soon anyway, so we can take our time with the paperwork.
player_death_soul_shattered: 💀 My souls have been shattered... (I feel my body reconstructing once again.)

hostile: Attention. A 'distinguished guest' has just arrived at our terminal, single-handedly plummeting the average intelligence and morality of the facility.
I can already hear the scrap-metal-stinking rats of the Resistance scurrying around the perimeter.
The mere thought of what kind of hideous hybrid a Necromancer and those machine-obsessives will concoct is giving me a headache.
normal: New inmate transfer report. A Necromancer has joined our peaceful hell.
I have high expectations for how you will brighten this bleak terminal atmosphere with your collection of bones.
To our newcomer: I highly recommend you don't covet your senior inmates' 'souls' too much and try to play nice.

hostile: Announcement. The mass of 'Belphegor' blocking the B2 transfer route has finally been dismantled into pieces.
Now that the filth occupying the tracks is gone, soul transportation will resume—but I’m already getting a headache thinking about who’s going to scrub that sticky spirit-residue off the floor.
The Reaper, Master of this terminal, is desperately seeking the Necromancer. Better run until your feet catch fire. Oh, wait, you're already a ghost—can you even see them?
normal: Notice. The 'congestion' at the B2 transfer route has been cleared. Yes, it seems some nameless undead finally managed to carve out those revolting souls.
The trains will move again thanks to that, though I doubt the stench of that thick malice and resentment on the tracks will fade anytime soon.
The Reaper, Master of this terminal, is desperately seeking the Necromancer. Better run until your feet catch fire. Oh, wait, you're already a ghost—can you even see them?

hostile: Attention. That fellow Jed from the infirmary is looking for the Necromancer. Whether it's to return that rusty scalpel or to demand a more 'useful' corpse, I couldn't say.
The disgusting pile of meat occupying the B2 transfer route has finally been 'purged.' Yes, it seems someone hacked through all that foul murderous intent.
Even the Reaper is clicking his tongue, surprised that tenacious life hasn't snapped yet. However, he has prepared an 'invitation to a deeper place' befitting such a struggle.
normal: Notice. Jed from the infirmary is desperately looking for the Necromancer. If you're done with your labor, you might want to head over there.
The congestion on B2 has been resolved, and train operations have resumed. Though the stench of that thick resentment on the tracks won't fade for a while.
It seems the Reaper thinks quite highly of the Necromancer's skills. Rumor has it the Necromancer's seal has grown loose.

hostile: Congratulations. The sturdy steel golem of B3 has been reduced to scrap metal by the Necromancer's filth and the Resistance's tools.
Now, who's going to handle the massive cargo loading? Surely those high-and-mighty mechanics babbling about revolution aren't planning to do it themselves?
The scrap disposal costs will be deducted from the bounties on you and that illegal repair shop gang, so please, keep on sinning diligently.
Ah, and the Reaper is beyond furious. He wants an explanation for the stoppage at the loading dock, so stand by for an immediate summons to his office.
normal: The golem at the B3 loading dock has been put to sleep for 'precision maintenance.' In a thousand pieces, that is.
The glares of the staff who now have to perform manual loading for the time being are yours to handle, Mr. Necromancer.
You might have thought bones were more efficient than machinery, but clearly, you didn't realize the cleanup costs would be higher.
Proceed to the Reaper's office immediately. You'll be listening to his nagging for as many pieces of the golem as you broke.

hostile: The Chamberlain, once the pride of our terminal, has finally decided to become a 'servant' to the Necromancer and the Resistance.
Instead of elegant tea service, we'll be drinking oily bone-dust tea. I suppose the terminal's prestige ends here.
My dear Chamberlain, surely you don't believe that stench of rotting meat mixed with engine oil is actually the 'scent of freedom'?
normal: The Chamberlain has gone on a 'field internship' with the Necromancer. I imagine he'll return with a rather lifeless complexion.
The terminal's chief administrator deciding to become a skeleton's lackey... what a creative career move.
Anyone wishing to fill the Chamberlain's vacancy should go to the Necromancer and offer up their head. It's quite simple, really.

hostile: So, the hideous union has finally been consummated. News reached us that the Necromancer and the Resistance are now rolling around in the same pit.
I only hope that bizarre hobby of shoving machine parts into the bones of the dead doesn't spread throughout the entire terminal.
I ask the traitors: is that place, with its stench of rotting corpses and engine grease, truly the paradise you dreamed of?
normal: Word is that the Resistance has been acting suspicious lately...
...I'm truly looking forward to seeing how much more of the terminal's budget you're going to waste.
To avoid frightening the citizens with those grotesque things they're building, we would appreciate it if you moved only at night.

hostile: Charon, the former administrator and pollutant of the underground sector, has been 'completely incinerated.' Beware of soul-fragment scattering caused by the brutal disposal method.
Execution of the code-violator is complete. Though the process bordered on butchery, the system records only the resulting cleanliness.
The pollutant has been removed, but a 'killer intent' far more foul than his remains in the current sector. All residents are advised to avoid contact.
normal: The signal for the criminal Charon—a defect in the management server—has been completely extinguished.
The flow of souls, previously stagnant due to the defective unit, has been normalized. This execution is classified as a 'qualified disposal.'
Situation concluded. All units cease agitation and return to your posts. The Reaper will perform the final inspection personally.

bridgeMemos: 📢 Following the previous report, here is an additional announcement...
📢 We have just received an additional report.
terminalMessages: 📢 "Attention. A coolant leak has been detected in Sector 3. Workers in the vicinity must evacuate immediately."
📢 "Notice: Ration allotments will be cut by 15% due to delays in today's unloading schedule."
📢 "*Static*... Current oxygen levels on B3 at 88%. This is within normal parameters. Continue your labor."
📢 "Warning. Unauthorized spirit energy detected. Raising security level."
📢 "Announcement. The internal spy recently caught was executed immediately at the loading dock compactor."
📢 "Security Protocol Compliance: Unauthorized possession of corpses is strictly prohibited."
📢 "The Great Age of Steel. Flesh rots, but machines are eternal."
📢 "Necromancy is a disease. Immediately report any colleagues showing abnormal symptoms to the administration."
📢 "Today's slogan: Higher loads, faster processes, more perfect control."
📢 "47 unclaimed corpses confirmed. Starting transfer to the disposal process."
📢 "*Static*... Personal effects of workers who died today will be incinerated at noon."
📢 "Unloading efficiency decreased by 4%. Cause determined to be aging of human resources."
📢 "Attention. Screaming is noise pollution. Please maintain silence."
📢 "Attempting to escape is a choice, but the administration reserves the right to recycle after termination."
📢 "Security Team Notice: Do not take intruders alive. It's a waste of ammunition."
📢 "Machines do not lie. Trust the engine more than your muscles."
📢 "Necromancer detected. Reporting again after cessation of vital signs. End."
📢 "The loading dock has no interest in your feelings. Move the boxes."
📢 "*Static*... Please note that leaked coolant instantly freezes 70% of the human body."
📢 "Attention. A small human resource (lost child) was found at Loading Dock 2. Owners, please collect before disposal."
📢 "Notice: A lost child is being held. If not collected within 6 hours, they will be placed into the loading dock's automatic cleaning system."
📢 "*Static*... To the parents looking for a lost child: Emotional agitation hinders work efficiency. Return to your posts immediately."
📢 "Attention. A subject with immature cognitive abilities has strayed from the tracks. Please place in the nearest collection bin if found."
📢 "Today's lost and found: 1 prosthetic arm, an old doll, an unidentified finger. No owners sought. Scheduled for incineration."
📢 "*Static*... Crying has been detected in the loading dock. Security teams, please eliminate the noise source immediately."
📢 "Notice: For asset protection, please attach an identification tag to the child's ankle. Untagged subjects will be classified as organic waste."
📢 "Attention. Seeking family members is an unauthorized personal activity. Please reflect on this only after meeting your quotas."
📢 "*Static*... The identification tag of lost subject 'Amy (7 years old)' was found damaged. Just letting you know."
